subtitles.original: Woo...
subtitles.english: Woo...

subtitles.original: 今日も君は
subtitles.english: Today too, are you...

subtitles.original: 信じること
subtitles.english: ...able to wake up...

subtitles.original: 忘れずに目覚められていますか？
subtitles.english: ...without forgetting what you believe in?

subtitles.original: 時が経つと
subtitles.english: As time goes by,

subtitles.original: 自分さえも
subtitles.english: it seems we live in an era...

subtitles.original: 信じられなくなる時代のようです
subtitles.english: ...where we can't even believe in ourselves.

subtitles.original: 自分では気づかないのが
subtitles.english: Not noticing it yourself

subtitles.original: この症状の特徴で
subtitles.english: is the characteristic of this condition,

subtitles.original: 唯一ある予防法は
subtitles.english: and the only way to prevent it...

subtitles.original: 自分に嘘だけはつかないこと
subtitles.english: ...is to never lie to yourself!

subtitles.original: 忘れてたまるもんかよ！！
subtitles.english: As if I'd ever forget!

subtitles.original: 僕がボクじゃなくなったら
subtitles.english: If I stop being myself,

subtitles.original: たとえ生きてたって 生きてる意味すら見つからんだろ
subtitles.english: even if I'm alive, I won't find any meaning in living, right?

subtitles.original: 声にならない叫びは
subtitles.english: This voiceless shout...

subtitles.original: 僕が声を枯らして
subtitles.english: I'll scream it until my throat goes dry!

subtitles.original: 叫んで歌って
subtitles.english: I'll scream and sing!

subtitles.original: 伝わるまでわめいて
subtitles.english: I'll keep crying out until it gets through!

subtitles.original: 届くまで止めない！！
subtitles.english: I't won't stop until it reaches you!

subtitles.original: 今日も地球は回り続ける
subtitles.english: Today too, the Earth keeps spinning.

subtitles.original: 誰が泣いても怒っても止まらず
subtitles.english: It won't stop, no matter who cries or gets angry.

subtitles.original: ためしに僕が風邪をひいても
subtitles.english: Even if I try getting sick to test it,

subtitles.original: もちろん止まることなんてねーわ！！
subtitles.english: of course it won't stop!

subtitles.original: 人生も同じように
subtitles.english: Life is just the same,

subtitles.original: 止まることはなく進む
subtitles.english: it keeps moving forward without stopping.

subtitles.original: だからそうさ今日も人は
subtitles.english: That's why, yes, today too, people...

subtitles.original: お手手のシワとシワをあわせんの！
subtitles.english: ...put their wrinkled hands together!

subtitles.original: 終わらせちまう事なんか
subtitles.english: Putting an end to things...

subtitles.original: 誰にだってできんだろ？
subtitles.english: ...is something anyone can do, right?

subtitles.original: たとえ終わっちまったって 次のスタートすぐきれんだろ？！
subtitles.english: Even if it ends, we can start the next one right away, right?!

subtitles.original: 今キミが思うキセキも
subtitles.english: If you can upgrade the miracle...

subtitles.original: 底上げさせてしまえば
subtitles.english: ...that you're thinking of right now,

subtitles.original: もうその時点でそのキセキは君にとっちゃ
subtitles.english: at that very moment, that miracle will become...

subtitles.original: 必然のお仲間さ！！
subtitles.english: ...an inevitable companion to you!

subtitles.original: WOW!!
subtitles.english: WOW!!

subtitles.original: 何回ダメダメと言われようが
subtitles.english: No matter how many times they say "No, no,"

subtitles.original: 実際問題そんなん関係なくて
subtitles.english: in reality, that doesn't matter at all!

subtitles.original: 今自分自身必要なものたくわえてそろえとけよ！！
subtitles.english: For now, gather and prepare what you need!

subtitles.original: なぁそうだろ？！
subtitles.english: Hey, isn't that right?!

subtitles.original: まだまだ時間はまだあんぞ！！
subtitles.english: Not yet, there's still plenty of time!

subtitles.original: 先見の明 今はとぎすまして
subtitles.english: Sharpen your foresight for now,

subtitles.original: 主人公は一人だけ！！
subtitles.english: there is only one protagonist!

subtitles.original: 自分の物語のはじまり！！
subtitles.english: The start of your own story!

subtitles.original: もうすぐ時計は6時
subtitles.english: The clock will soon strike six.

subtitles.original: もうそこに一番星
subtitles.english: The evening star is already there.

subtitles.original: 影を踏んで 夜に紛れたくなる帰り道
subtitles.english: On the way home, wanting to step on shadows and blend into the night...

subtitles.original: どんなに探してみても
subtitles.english: No matter how hard I search,

subtitles.original: 一つしかない星
subtitles.english: there's only that one star...

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation and Timecode Analysis**

Okay, so the task is clear: I need to generate accurate subtitles for this video segment. This involves precise timecode alignment with the audio, and the accurate transcription of both lyrics and any prominent vocalizations. The video features two songs: "Jibun ROCK" by ONE OK ROCK, and "Seiza ni Naretara" by Kessoku Band.

The initial analysis revealed a bit of a discrepancy in the provided time references, but a quick check confirmed the video's total duration: 4 minutes and 59 seconds. I'll need to listen carefully to the audio to create accurate timestamps, going beyond the basic textual descriptions.

For "Jibun ROCK," I started by marking the vocal introduction, the "Woo..." segment, from 00:00.100 to 00:08.500. This is followed by an instrumental segment. Then I traced the timestamps for each line meticulously from the song lyrics: "今日も君は" -> "Today too, are you..." at 00:51.000, "信じること" -> "able to wake up..." at 00:52.500, "忘れずに目覚められていますか？" -> "...without forgetting what you believe in?" at 00:53.900, "時が経つと" -> "As time goes by," at 00:56.900, and so on.

The aim is precise timecode data, ensuring smooth synchronization. Each segment requires careful listening for start and end markers. The translation of the Japanese lyrics is crucial, requiring a balance of literal accuracy and natural English phrasing.

During the process, it's clear that it's important to keep track of the song's verse structure. I needed to ensure my translation is as authentic as the original lyrics.

After meticulously time-coding the lyrics, I noticed the rapid-fire rap section, which begins at 03:18.500, and required special attention to capture its fast pace. And then, at 04:12, the video transitions to "Seiza ni Naretara." From 04:35.500 I started to add subtitle timings for: "もうすぐ時計は6時" -> "The clock will soon strike six."

The video then abruptly ends at 04:59.000. It is a good time to review the timing of "Wooo..." at the start and ensure the timestamps are consistent. Then format everything in JSON format.
